request.query: Compare single-agent and multi-agent workflows for customer support

sources.title: Anthropic: Building Effective Agents
sources.snippet: Agent systems work best when workflows are simple, observable, and built from composable patterns such as routing, parallelization, and evaluation.

sources.title: LangSmith Tracing Documentation
sources.snippet: LangSmith helps developers trace, debug, evaluate, and monitor LLM applications across development and production workflows.

sources.title: Lab Rubric: Multi-Agent Research System
sources.snippet: The lab rewards role clarity, shared state design, failure guards, benchmarking, and trace explanations.

sources.title: LangGraph Concepts
sources.snippet: LangGraph models agent applications as stateful graphs with nodes, edges, conditional routing, persistence, and controllable execution.

sources.title: OpenAI Agents SDK Orchestration
sources.snippet: Agent orchestration benefits from explicit handoffs, tool boundaries, guardrails, and traceable execution paths.
